2605.04897.title: Storage Is Not Memory: A Retrieval-Centered Architecture for Agent Recall
2605.04897.paper_summary: Extraction at ingestion is the wrong primitive for agent memory: content discarded before the query is known cannot be recovered at retrieval time. We propose True Memory, a six-layer architecture that shifts the center of the system from a storage schema to a multi-stage retrieval pipeline operating over events preserved verbatim. The full system runs as a single SQLite file on commodity CPU with no external database, vector index, graph store, or GPU. On LoCoMo (1,540 questions across 10 multi-session conversations), True Memory Pro reaches 93.0% accuracy (3-run mean) against 61.4% for Mem0, 65.4% for Supermemory, approximately 71% for Zep, and 94.5% for EverMemOS under a matched gpt-4.1-mini answer model. On LongMemEval (500 questions), True Memory Pro reaches 87.8% (3-run mean). On BEAM-1M (700 questions at the 1-million-token scale), True Memory Pro reaches 76.6% (3-run mean), above the prior published result of 73.9% for Hindsight. A 56-configuration ablation shows a 1.3-percentage-point spread within the top-performing configuration family.
2605.04897.paper_summary_zh: 提取在攝取時是代理記憶的錯誤原始概念：在查詢已知之前被丟棄的內容無法在檢索時恢復。我們提出了真實記憶（True Memory），這是一個六層架構，將系統的中心從存儲模式轉移到一個多階段檢索管道，該管道對事件進行逐字保留。整個系統作為一個單一的SQLite文件運行在普通CPU上，無需外部數據庫、向量索引、圖形存儲或GPU。在LoCoMo（10個多會話對話中的1,540個問題）上，真實記憶專業版（True Memory Pro）達到93.0%的準確率（3次運行平均），而Mem0為61.4%，Supermemory為65.4%，Zep約為71%，EverMemOS在匹配的gpt-4.1-mini答案模型下為94.5%。在LongMemEval（500個問題）上，真實記憶專業版達到87.8%（3次運行平均）。在BEAM-1M（700個問題，規模為100萬個標記）上，真實記憶專業版達到76.6%（3次運行平均），高於Hindsight先前發表的73.9%的結果。一個56配置的消融實驗顯示在表現最佳的配置家族中有1.3個百分點的差距。
2605.04897.author: Joshua Adler et.al.
